Battista Franco

2 works in the gallery.
Click any image to enlarge. Use ← → or close with Esc.
Virgin and Child with St. Catherine of Alexandria and Saint Anne (?)
by Battista Franco
Italy, 16th century · c. 1545 · pen and brown ink and brush and brown wash with red chalk underdrawing, heightened with white gouache (partially tarnished); pricked (lower part of Virgin)
Skeleton
by Battista Franco
Italy, 16th century · early 1540s · pen and brown ink; incised
←Rosselli, Francesco German; Franconia→
